meta_title: Terms of Service | NextGen Floor Solutions Thailand
meta_description: Terms of Service for NextGen Floor Solutions Thailand. Read our terms and conditions governing the use of our website and floor restoration services.
hero_description: Terms and conditions governing the use of our website and services
intro: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your use of the NextGen Floor Solutions Thailand website at nextgenfloors.co.th ("Website") and any services provided by NextGen Floor Solutions Thailand ("we", "us", or "our"). By accessing or using our Website, you agree to be bound by these Terms.
section1_content: NextGen Floor Solutions Thailand provides premium floor restoration services including PU (polyurethane) floor coating, terrazzo polishing, and functional additive applications for commercial and industrial environments in Thailand. All services are subject to a separate service agreement or quotation specific to your project.
section2_p1: All quotations provided through our website or by our team are estimates based on the information provided at the time of inquiry. Final pricing may vary based on on-site assessment, actual floor conditions, area measurements, and specific project requirements.
section2_p2: Quotations are valid for 30 days from the date of issue unless otherwise stated. We reserve the right to adjust pricing based on changes in material costs or project scope.
section3_p1: Upon acceptance of a quotation, a separate service agreement will be provided detailing the scope of work, timeline, payment terms, and warranty conditions. Work will commence only after both parties have agreed to the terms of the service agreement.
section3_p2: Project timelines are estimates and may be affected by factors including site conditions, weather, and material availability. We will communicate any significant changes to the expected timeline promptly.
section4_content: Our PU floor coating services include a warranty as specified in the individual service agreement. Warranty terms vary by project type and are subject to proper maintenance by the client as per our care instructions. The warranty does not cover damage caused by misuse, negligence, or unauthorized modifications.
section5_intro: When using our Website, you agree to:
section5_item1: Provide accurate and truthful information when submitting contact forms or quote requests
section5_item2: Not upload malicious files, viruses, or harmful content through our forms
section5_item3: Not attempt to access restricted areas of the Website or interfere with its operation
section5_item4: Not use the Website for any unlawful purpose or in violation of these Terms
section6_content: All content on this Website, including text, images, logos, graphics, and software, is the property of NextGen Floor Solutions Thailand or our licensors and is protected by Thai and international copyright and trademark laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works from our content without our prior written consent. Before-and-after project photographs remain our property and may be used in our portfolio and marketing materials unless otherwise agreed.
section7_p1: The information provided on this Website is for general informational purposes. While we strive to keep the content accurate and up-to-date, we make no warranties or representations about the completeness, reliability, or suitability of the information.
section7_p2: To the maximum extent permitted by Thai law, NextGen Floor Solutions Thailand shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the Website or reliance on its content.
section8_content: Our Website may contain links to third-party websites or services, including WhatsApp, LINE, and Google Maps. We are not responsible for the content, privacy practices, or availability of these external sites. Your use of third-party services is subject to their respective terms and policies.
section9_content: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Kingdom of Thailand. Any disputes arising from these Terms or your use of the Website shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Thailand.
section10_content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date. Your continued use of the Website after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the modified Terms.
section11_content: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us:
